title: Phase 4: Single-Dashboard UI Overhaul & Code Modifications
description: Remove the multi-step Wizard in streamlit_app.py and build a unified Advanced Dashboard integrating Center-to-Center Travel, Active Area Width, Magnet Grade Br Helper, Gap/Pole-Pitch calculations, Cogging/Ripple physics feedback, and Vernier spacing ratios.

travel_m_mapping.tooltip: The continuous displacement range of the carriage reference center.

board_width_mapping.tooltip: Width of the active trace area perpendicular to motion where active conductors run to generate Lorentz force.

physics_additions.cogging_stator: 0.0 N (Coreless / air-core stator eliminates cogging force completely)

execution_steps.action: Remove wizard mode. Convert UI into a single state-contained Advanced Dashboard with sidebar toggles and collapsibles.
Implement the Linear vs. Radial (Rotary) high-level toggle that dynamically swaps variables and terminology.
Refactor Travel, Board Width, Magnet Grade, and Magnet Gap controls according to mathematical specifications.
Integrate zero-cogging explanation, live force ripple computation, and the Spacing Ratio dropdown into physics feedback panels.
Update default or derived property methods if necessary to reflect the updated configurations cleanly.
